# AiShort

> Frustrated by irrelevant AI answers? AiShort offers practical prompt templates for writing, coding, and translation. One-click copy to unlock precise AI outputs and double your efficiency!

## Documentation

- [Deploy AI Short | Vercel, Docker & Cloudflare Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/deploy): Want to host your own AI prompt library? Deploy AI Short easily using Vercel, Docker, or Cloudflare. Includes config tips and auto-update scripts.
- [Firefox Extension Setup - Pinning & Permissions Guide](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/firefox-extension-setting): Firefox extension setup guide - Pin extension to toolbar, authorize to run on websites like ChatGPT, Gemini, ensuring sidebar displays correctly.
- [Chrome CRX Install - Manual Developer Mode Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/manual-chrome-extension): Manually install AI Short extension via CRX file. Enable developer mode and drag to install. Includes solutions for common issues.
- [Chrome ZIP Install - Manual AI Short Extension Setup](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/manual-chrome-extension-zip): Install AI Short extension in Chrome via ZIP file. Unzip and drag into extensions page. Suitable when CRX cannot be installed.
- [Install AI Short Extension - Chrome, Edge & Firefox Download](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/README): Boost your AI workflow with the AI Short extension. Download for Chrome, Edge, or Firefox and access prompts instantly via sidebar or shortcut.
- [AI Short Extension Guide - Sidebar & Shortcuts Mastered](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/extension/usage): Master the AI Short browser extension! Enable sidebar, one-click invoke prompt library with Alt+Shift+S.
- [AI Short Account | Google & Passwordless Login Guide](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/account): Access your AI Short prompts anywhere with Google or passwordless login. Manage your account settings and recover data securely in seconds.
- [AI Short Community | Discover & Share Quality AI Prompts](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/community): Discover top-rated AI prompts in the community! Filter by votes, share your best ideas for exposure, or manage private prompts for personal use.
- [AI Short FAQ | Prompt Optimization & Fixing Hallucinations](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/faq): Getting wrong AI answers? Learn how to fix prompt issues, avoid AI hallucinations, and secure your data with our comprehensive troubleshooting guide.
- [AI Short Quick Start | Copy Prompts to ChatGPT/DeepSeek](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/getting-started): Start boosting AI productivity in 30 seconds! Copy tailored prompts to ChatGPT, Gemini, and DeepSeek for instant conversation improvements.
- [AI Short Interface Guide | Tag Filtering & Smart Search](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/interface): Master the AI Short interface! Quickly locate prompts via tag filtering and keyword search, understand card details and collection operations.
- [My Collection | Organize AI Prompts with Tags & Sorting](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/my-collection): Collect your favorite AI prompts and manage them with custom tags. Supports drag-and-drop sorting to build a personalized prompt library.
- [AI Short 离线部署 | 企业内网无需外部服务器](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/offline): AI Short 离线版专为无法访问外网的企业和团队设计。无需后端服务器，无需注册账户，数据存储在浏览器本地，开箱即用。
- [AI Short Custom Prompts | Create, Save & Share](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/guides/user-prompts): Create and save your own AI prompts for instant access. Share with the community or keep them private, and export backups anytime.
- [AI Short - Curated ChatGPT & AI Prompt Library](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/introduction): Struggling with AI responses? AI Short offers curated prompts for ChatGPT, Claude & more. Copy prompts, manage collections, and boost productivity instantly.
- [AiShort Privacy Policy](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/privacy-policy): AiShort Privacy Policy Last updated May 25, 2023 This privacy notice for aishort.top ("we," "us," or "our") describes how and why we might collect, store, use,...
- [Terms of Service](https://www.aishort.top/en/docs/terms-of-service): Terms of Service Last updated May 25, 2023 1. Introduction These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the website, products, and services (collectively,...
